docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BARSOTTI, DAVID DBA MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSHAFA, NABIL DBA ALPHA LIMOUSINE & CAR SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARSOTTI, DAVID DBA MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KOSHAFA, NABIL DBA ALPHA LIMOUSINE & CAR SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANK LEMUS--SERVICE ADVISOR AND ARMIN ZIPPELO--SERVICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
